import React from 'react'; const Dashboard = () => { return (

Dashboard

Welcome to the Placement Management System

Total Students

1,247

892

Total Companies

156

Placement Rate

78.5%

  • Rahul Kumar - Computer Science
  • Priya Sharma - Information Technology
  • Amit Patel - Computer Science

New Companies

  • Tech Solutions Inc
  • Global Systems
  • Data Analytics Pro
); }; export default Dashboard;
